{{Quote|We'll enter their launching bays and destroy the facilities there, then gut the ship from within.|Penzak Kraal, shortly before his death|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream">''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]''</ref>}}
'''Penzak Kraal''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warrior]] who, along with the other members of [[Domain Kraal]], was assigned to guard over the captured [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. A skilled pilot and an experienced warrior, Kraal was nonetheless killed in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], while on patrol in the [[Pyria system]].

==Biography==
[[Domain Kraal]] was assigned the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] in the [[Pyria system]] to watch over during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. An important staging point for the successful [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|assault]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Borleias had a relatively small garrison of [[Yorik-et|coralskipper]] pilots and [[Warrior caste|warriors]], of which Penzak Kraal was one. He and his [[domain]] kinsman, [[Charat Kraal]], were often assigned to patrol the system; however, as the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] had been dealt defeat after defeat, the two were more accustomed to spend their hours in space discussing the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], the [[Yun'o|gods]] and the "infidels" who populated [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

It was during one of these discussions, while the two warriors were in a distant orbit around Borleias, that elements of the [[New Republic Third Fleet|New Republic Third Battle Group]] reverted from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] with the intent of recapturing Borleias from the Yuuzhan Vong. Kraal quickly donned his [[Tall-Yor|cognition hood]] and warned his domain's [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the threat. As the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']] disgorged its [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] for an assault on the planet, Kraal decided to make an attack run on the ventral [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] of the Star Destroyer, imagining that once he and Charat were underneath the vessel, they could fly into the hangar and destroy the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] from the inside. Although Kraal managed to avoid destruction as he evaded the starfighters, a [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] volley from the ''Mon Mothma'' hit his vessel as he raced towards the hangar. The blast obliterated Penzak Kraal's coralskipper in an instant, killing him.

==Personality and traits==
More experienced and decisive than Charat, Penzak Kraal was a capable pilot, and rather than commit himself to a pointless attack against the many starfighter squadrons present, he decided to make a bold run on a Star Destroyer. He was dismissive of his kinsman's suggestions that the galaxy's defenders were as resourceful as they often seemed, and was quite abrasive in his rebuttal of his kinsman's statements.

==Behind the scenes==
Penzak Kraal dies in the first chapter of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'', soon after his introduction.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' {{1st}}
